fixed bottom tab and floating pill spacing

classified_followups: MVP leftover list items do not expose planner meal label or serving count, so mobile meta copy stays date-based instead of reproducing the prototype's meal/servings phrase.
MVP leftover list items may not expose recipe thumbnail URLs, so null thumbnails use the existing fallback food tile instead of prototype-specific bitmap thumbnails.
Shared bottom-tab pantry icon shape remains inherited from the already-merged Wave1 mobile navigation component and is outside this LEFTOVERS/ATE branch.
